text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The drag coefficient only dropped by
twenty-five percent… But what if I reduce
the distance by five percent… Tch.
What a total waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho… Another day of your obsession with
numbers, I see. Ahhh, such devotion!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The hell?! You tryin' to start
a fight or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No… I simply can't help but wonder
if the answers you seek can really be
found in the data you love so dearly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What will happen when your data and numbers
prove ineffective? What if the answer lies in
spiritualism or even pure fantasy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard you look, the kernel
of knowledge you seek will evade you.
Will you still peel back every layer of the
onion in hopes of finding it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
…Huh? Onions are root vegetables. Looking
for a kernel'd be pretty freakin' stupid.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Aaahahaha!! Precisely! Another one of my
little jokes, I must admit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But it seems my joke was able to disrupt
your composure, if only for a moment.
Perhaps I could disrupt your performance
on the track in the same way.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see you try…
You're as crazy as ever.
